data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-cancel/release rules for unpaid seats', which is a critical aspect of the use case. However, the evidence does not demonstrate that the system automatically cancels or releases unpaid seats as described in the linked use case. While the scenario mentions that the system warns the organizer and releases unpaid seats unless overridden, there is no concrete evidence showing this functionality in action, leading to a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence provided that demonstrates the auto-cancel/release functionality for unpaid seats.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
